issue.message: No need to call `super.onCleared`; the super method is defined to be empty
No need to call `super.onCleared`; the super method is defined to be empty
Must call `getDefaultUncaughtExceptionHandler()` to get the existing handler, and call `existingHandler.uncaughtException(thread, throwable)` from your new handler
Limit vector icons sizes to 200×200 to keep icon drawing fast; see https://developer.android.com/studio/write/vector-asset-studio#when for more
Limit vector icons sizes to 200×200 to keep icon drawing fast; see https://developer.android.com/studio/write/vector-asset-studio#when for more

Composable functions that return Unit should start with an uppercase letter
Modifier parameter should be the first optional parameter
"Guión" is a common misspelling; did you mean "Guion"?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="font_dancing_script" comment="Font style name">Guión de baile</string>

issue.message: Repeated word "de" in message: possible typo
issue.errorLine1:
<string name="changelog_v3_5_0">
Se renovó por completo la sección Acerca de de la aplicación.
Se añadieron accesos directos desde el lanzador.
Se corrigió que el menú de navegación no apareciera con la navegación por botones.
Se mejoró la visibilidad del menú de navegación inferior al desplazarse.
Se añadió compatibilidad con idioma por aplicación para aShell You (las traducciones aún no están completas).
Muchas optimizaciones de código.</string>

issue.message: Formatting %d followed by words ("remaining"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
issue.errorLine1: <string name="apply_to_all" comment="%1$d = number of remaining items. Used in file conflict resolution">Apply to all (%1$d remaining)</string>

issue.message: Formatting %d followed by words ("items"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
issue.errorLine1: <string name="copied_items" comment="%1$d = number of items copied to clipboard">Copied %1$d items</string>

issue.message: Formatting %d followed by words ("item"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
issue.errorLine1: <string name="copying_items" comment="%1$d = number of items being copied">Copying %1$d item(s)</string>

issue.message: Formatting %d followed by words ("items"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
issue.errorLine1: <string name="cut_items" comment="%1$d = number of items cut to clipboard">Cut %1$d items</string>

issue.message: Formatting %d followed by words ("selected"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
issue.errorLine1: <string name="delete_items_message" comment="%1$d = number of selected items">Are you sure you want to delete %1$d selected items?</string>

issue.message: Formatting %d followed by words ("items"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
issue.errorLine1: <string name="delete_items_title" comment="%1$d = number of items">Delete %1$d items?</string>

issue.message: Formatting %d followed by words ("items"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
issue.errorLine1: <string name="fb_deleted_items" comment="%1$d = number of deleted items">Deleted %1$d items</string>

issue.message: Formatting %d followed by words ("items"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
issue.errorLine1: <string name="fb_paste_completed" comment="%1$d = number of items pasted">Completed: %1$d items</string>

issue.message: Formatting %d followed by words ("items"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
issue.errorLine1: <string name="fb_paste_completed_with_failed" comment="%1$d = completed, %2$d = skipped, %3$d = failed">Completed: %1$d items, %2$d skipped, %3$d failed</string>

issue.message: Formatting %d followed by words ("items"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
issue.errorLine1: <string name="fb_paste_completed_with_skipped" comment="%1$d = completed, %2$d = skipped">Completed: %1$d items, %2$d skipped</string>

issue.message: Formatting %d followed by words ("libraries"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
issue.errorLine1: <string name="library_count" comment="%1$d = number of third-party libraries">%1$d libraries detected</string>

issue.message: Formatting %d followed by words ("item"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
issue.errorLine1: <string name="moving_items" comment="%1$d = number of items being moved">Moving %1$d item(s)</string>

issue.message: Formatting %d followed by words ("days"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
issue.errorLine1: <string name="n_days" comment="%d = number of days for cache duration setting">%d days</string>

issue.message: `checkClientTrusted` is empty, which could cause insecure network traffic due to trusting arbitrary TLS/SSL certificates presented by peers
`checkServerTrusted` is empty, which could cause insecure network traffic due to trusting arbitrary TLS/SSL certificates presented by peers

Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 28
This folder configuration (`v26`) is unnecessary; `minSdkVersion` is 28. Merge all the resources in this folder into `mipmap-anydpi`.
